sourceHierarchyApplied: official FIFA disciplinary or fair-play data
official FIFA match reports containing cards
official FIFA standings or qualification publication that explicitly resolves the tie

evidenceSufficiencyPolicy.preferred: Complete official fair-play records for all 48 teams.
acceptedIfAvailable: Complete official fair-play records for all 12 third-placed teams.
Complete official fair-play records for every team still tied when fair play is reached.
An official FIFA publication that explicitly provides the final third-place ranking and the tie-break basis.
An official FIFA Round-of-32 listing may confirm participants, but by itself does not provide fair-play deduction totals or the exact Ecuador/Ghana ordering basis.
notAccepted: Inferred card totals from unsourced summaries.
One unexplained number when underlying official disciplinary records are available.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 match calendar API, First Stage
sourcesSearched.extractionMethod: Inspected response keys and representative match records for disciplinary, fair-play, card, event, and match-report fields.
sourcesSearched.result: Contains 72 completed first-stage matches and official scores. It does not expose card events or fair-play deduction totals. MatchReportUrl is null in inspected records.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The first-stage calendar source provides official fixtures and scores but no complete disciplinary events or fair-play deduction totals for Ecuador and Ghana.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 full match calendar API
sourcesSearched.extractionMethod: Inspected the full competition calendar for official Round-of-32 participants and disciplinary fields.
sourcesSearched.result: Contains populated Round-of-32 participants, but does not expose fair-play deductions, disciplinary events, or the exact third-place ranking tie-break basis.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The full calendar is retained only as a Round-of-32 cross-check; it does not provide fair-play totals or the Ecuador/Ghana ordering tie-break basis.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA men's ranking approved API
sourcesSearched.extractionMethod: Inspected approved ranking rows for the 48 tournament teams.
sourcesSearched.result: Provides FIFA ranking data only. It cannot be used before the fair-play criterion unless official fair-play records are complete or explicitly equal for the tied teams.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The approved rankings source is a later tie-break input only and cannot substitute for missing fair-play evidence at the reached criterion.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA ranking schedule API
sourcesSearched.result: Provides ranking release metadata only; no disciplinary or fair-play data.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The ranking schedule source describes ranking release metadata and provides no fair-play totals, disciplinary events, or Ecuador/Ghana comparison.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA match detail endpoint candidate
sourcesSearched.result: Endpoint returned HTTP 404; no stable official disciplinary source was available at this URL.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The candidate match-detail endpoint was unavailable and therefore supplied no reviewed disciplinary events or fair-play totals.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA live match-event endpoint candidate
sourcesSearched.result: Endpoint returned HTTP 404; no stable official disciplinary source was available at this URL.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The candidate live-event endpoint was unavailable and therefore supplied no reviewed disciplinary events or fair-play totals.

sourcesSearched.title: FIFA standings endpoint candidates
sourcesSearched.result: Inspected endpoint candidates returned HTTP 404; no stable official standings source with fair-play tie-break details was available.
sourcesSearched.insufficiencyReason: The candidate standings endpoint was unavailable and therefore supplied no official third-place ranking table, fair-play tie-break basis, or Ecuador/Ghana comparison.

missingFields: official disciplinary/card event records for group-stage matches 1 through 72
official third-place ranking table with fair-play tie-break details for Ecuador and Ghana
official fair-play comparison for Ecuador and Ghana

affectedTie.reason: The available official sources do not provide reviewed fair-play deductions or disciplinary events for Ecuador and Ghana.

conclusion.summary: No usable official fair-play evidence was found in the seven reviewed FIFA candidates as of 2026-06-28T17:05:00.000Z. This is limited to the reviewed candidates and does not claim no official evidence exists anywhere; the missing Ecuador/Ghana ordering does not affect qualification membership, qualifying group set BDEFIJKL, Annex C, or Round-of-32 participants. Finalized checked-in qualification, Round-of-32, and simulator-input artifacts are not generated in this source-gap artifact.
